## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Affected component

Which part of the monorepo is affected?

- [ ] API (`services/api`)
- [ ] Web (`apps/web`)
- [ ] Scheduling engine (`packages/core`)
- [ ] Android client (`apps/android`)
- [ ] iOS client (`apps/ios`)
- [ ] Other / not sure

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include logs or error output if available.

## Environment

- Version / commit: <!-- e.g. v1.2.0 or commit sha -->
- OS:
- Runtime versions (Go / Node / etc.):
- Browser (if web): 

## Additional context

Screenshots, configuration, or anything else that helps us understand the
problem.
